title: Update enzyme to version 2.5.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [enzyme](https://www.npmjs.com/package/enzyme) just published its new version 2.5.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency enzyme
New version 2.5.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of enzyme. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 105 commits . - [`e0ac400`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/e0ac40042af512229de61a4ddcb0db70103be9db) v2.5.0 - [`8b10257`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/8b10257efd76627c6a1d496bbf26e94d3044a3c0) Merge pull request #629 from baldwmic/patch-1 - [`4fb65cb`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/4fb65cb7030cec574585e5f26250e1bb8e49ce5e) Update hasClass.md - [`2a357f4`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/2a357f432e4e9c7a3f1d5d0020e622ba893777cf) Update hasClass.md - [`19d06e8`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/19d06e8cccfcdc777db36454dd101a1585189c3d) fixes #590: change isCompoundSelector to not match prop selector - [`58764f1`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/58764f1fd13ab338ccec68a728c2172ba7693848) [Docs] fix typo in ShallowWrapper/render.md - [`c1e03cc`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/c1e03cc079f65281ec0979f0dcd972a40fd0fd44) Use callback instead of cb - [`0e7c4d5`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/0e7c4d5146a9e172ef561d371c688039cc8d0583) Use batchedUpdates for setProps test - [`799c0d7`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/799c0d767155ed35dbcd034e90fc9634249f4f99) Add test for cb error if not function - [`0b424bd`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/0b424bd68e6db677f924c84c35a965be13e08c32) Default cb to undefined so it doesn't count toward functions length - [`0d6b8b4`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/0d6b8b40fe5e78fc789d0b569cab709960d8d632) Add tests - [`9b5a476`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/9b5a47618ab43b4da162a619b71606cf172aac80) Add callback to setProps and setState - [`f3a91e3`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/f3a91e3c66411400430be1f74cadfba467992224) Update docs - [`746eac4`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/746eac45356473bf079c6ed9f11f04403df049d4) Merge pull request #594 from Aweary/iterable-wrapper - [`5b9022a`](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/commit/5b9022a295f3bc3e52c426e65ec771b24da4d354) Only test iterable when Symbol.iterator exists There are 105 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/airbnb/enzyme/compare/811ec8dca4e8eb46dc10fcb70e1412d81872982b...e0ac40042af512229de61a4ddcb0db70103be9db). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
